_comment: ENDURING PASTE INTERFACE for backup reference data. Drop public post URLs here (LinkedIn /posts/… , X /status/… , YouTube watch?v=…). On the next sweep these are fetched and used to verify / fill events.json (dates, titles, speakers, recordings). Match a talk by its events.json date when known; otherwise add to 'unsorted' and I'll classify. Individual post URLs work even though company/profile pages are login-walled.
how_to_use: Add an object to refs. Minimum: a url. If you know the talk, set match_date to that talk's events.json date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional note for anything ambiguous. Commit — CI just validates the JSON; reconciliation happens on the next Claude sweep.

refs.note: Naim Rashid talk — verified, already in events.json. Example entry.
Curtis Huttenhower (Harvard) Health-series seminar — verified via syndication endpoint, matches events.json. Example X entry.
